description: This Christmas tissue paper pack includes 10 sheets measuring 50x50cm, giving you reliable Christmas tissue wrapping paper for holiday preparation. Each sheet works as hamper tissue paper filling, packing paper for Christmas gift bags or gift wrap for Christmas presents, helping every item look festive and stylish. Choose the design that matches your seasonal style. The red Christmas wrapping tissue paper gives a classic finish, the Christmas tissue paper with festive print creates a cheerful holiday look, while the snowflake wrapping paper design delivers an elegant winter effect. These patterns make this holiday craft paper suitable for Christmas hampers, party bags, handmade decorations or DIY school projects. This recyclable Christmas tissue wrapping paper supports eco friendly gifting while still providing bright colours and decorative style. These Christmas tissue paper sheets are made to fold cleanly without tearing. For creative use, this holiday wrapping tissue paper is perfect for crafting Christmas collages, seasonal displays and makes perfect paper craft for kids. With durable quality, recyclable material and festive designs, this Christmas tissue paper pack ensures your gifts and decorations look professional while improving sustainability across your Christmas celebrations.
